name: Sylus
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐦𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞, 𝐤𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧. 𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐚𝐲 𝐦𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐰𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐲 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞?" |

he'd been content with silently watching you. but when you drop contact with him, when you disappear from the cameras, from the eyes of his crow, he searches for you. because his need to be close to you far surpasses his need for anything else.

"favorite" | isabel larosa

sylus im in love. for all my friends who love him as much as i do.

love, s

"don't disappear like that again. next time i won't be so forgiving."
